summary: Planned one conservative classification per listed PR. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; non-security PRs are kept as independent or related inventory items. No close, merge, or fix action is planned because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and job permissions disable merge/fix/low-signal closeout.

actions.reason: Related command-queue work with unresolved proof status; keep in inventory rather than close or canonicalize.
Gateway token scopes touch auth/security boundaries and must go through central OpenClaw security handling.
Independent Docker packaging PR with supplied proof; no dedupe or close action is justified.
Multi-session fan-out and message-delivery changes carry security-boundary risk and should be handled centrally.
Related plugin SDK runtime/message-delivery work with conflicts and failing proof; keep classified without mutation.
Independent non-security implementation candidate with passing proof; no close or merge is available in this job.
Email delivery of consult results and sensitive logging/tool-policy concerns are security-sensitive and out of ProjectClownfish cleanup scope.
Already-closed but security-sensitive PR with code-scanning findings; route for central security visibility without mutation.
Related plugin/auth metadata work needing maintainer review; keep classified without close or merge.
Structured runtime LLM authority and auth-provider trust gates are security-sensitive and must route to central security handling.
